title: lavandula stoechas subsp. luisieri
intro: Lavandula stoechas subsp. luisieri, also known as Luisieri's Spanish lavender or Dwarf Spanish lavender, is a subspecies of the Lavandula stoechas plant, characterized by its compact growth habit and distinctive greyish-green foliage. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lavandula stoechas subsp. luisieri include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, infusions, and dried flowers, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
